response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js/Nest.js, along with strong relational database knowledge. His roles demonstrate pragmatic problem-solving and scalable solutions, though his current senior-level background may slightly exceed the junior/mid-level target. His AWS and Kubernetes exposure is valuable, but his remote work focus contrasts with the on-site requirement.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js/Nest.js
Proven experience with PostgreSQL, relational databases, and scalable architectures
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (relevant to clean architecture)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (current senior/staff-level positions)
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL compared to MongoDB
Remote work focus may not align with high on-site presence requirement
